video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood textures, soft lamplight. Yuna Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes, steadies a metal shield on a workbench. Yuna Oakspire, an androgynous quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, uses a repair tool on the shield. Cooperative teamwork, clear motions, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and character positions. Yuna Oakspire carefully taps the final repair mark on the shield while Yuna Starling maintains a steady grip. Friendly, diligent cooperation, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The scene depicts professional cooperation in a fantasy setting. No sexual content, no violence, no text, no watermarks.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is overwhelmed by post-raid gear repairs; Yuna Starling assists Yuna Oakspire to clear the backlog.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Gratitude for assistance during a gear backlog.
